data.body:
Converted from bug 0d45-1b1e (hardcoded macOS path). This epic supersedes and will close that bug upon completion.

### Planning Intelligence Log

- **Web research (Step 2.6)**: triggered
  - Bright-line conditions that fired: novel architectural pattern (plugin loading in web environments)
- **Scenario analysis (Step 2.75)**: triggered
  - Scenarios surviving blue team filter: 6 (from 12 red team scenarios)
- **Practitioner-requested additional cycles**: scenario analysis re-run 1 time(s), feasibility re-run 1 time(s)

### Key Research Findings
- extraKnownMarketplaces with source: directory — BROKEN (issues #13096, #23978, #17988)
- CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_SEED_DIR — works but only pre-launch (CLAUDE_ENV_FILE is shell-scoped)
- .claude/commands/ with shell preprocessing — VERIFIED working, zero-config
- claude plugin list — VERIFIED working (feasibility reviewer incorrectly claimed it doesn't exist; bug 9b34-b7ec filed)
- openshift/hypershift PR #7068 — tried extraKnownMarketplaces, then reverted in PR #7751
